description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named FBGEMM_GPU Lint that runs on push to main, on pull requests to main, and manually. The workflow should run on an ubuntu-latest environment with a bash shell, using a matrix strategy for Python 3.13. It should check out the repository, set up Miniconda, create a Conda environment, install lint tools, and then run various linting checks including flake8, ufmt, and Meta copyright header checks.
